subcodes.first_line: O Pen of Glory! I behold thee speaking throughout the nights and days - at times I hear thy melodies, and at others thy sighs and lamentations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلم ارئک ناطقا فی اللیالی و الایام مره اسمع نغماتک و اخری حنینک و بکائک
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the power of words; of speech
